seoDescription: Get in touch with the Cx Assistant team. We're here to help with questions about our AI-powered commissioning platform.
title: Contact Us
subtitle: Have a question, need support, or want to learn more about Cx Assistant? We'd love to hear from you.

email.title: Email Us
email.description: For general enquiries, support, or partnership opportunities, drop us an email and we'll get back to you.

linkedin.title: LinkedIn
linkedin.description: Follow us on LinkedIn for product updates, engineering insights, and commissioning best practices.

responseTime.title: Response Time
responseTime.description: We typically respond within 1 business day. For urgent support matters, please mark your email subject with [Urgent].

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Join commissioning teams already using Cx Assistant.
